query.text: select stt_rec_hd, sum(tt_qd) as tt_qd into #v from @@prime$partition$current with(nolock) where stt_rec = @stt_rec group by stt_rec_hd select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a with(nolock) left join cttt20 d with(nolock) on a.stt_rec_hd = d.stt_rec left join m43$$partition$current e with(nolock) on a.stt_rec = e.stt_rec left join #v f on a.stt_rec_hd = f.stt_rec_hd left join cttt50 h with(nolock) on a.stt_rec_phieu = h.stt_rec where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec order by a.line_nbr

action.text: &CheckRelativeDeclare; select @$relController = 'RDTran', @$relType = 'Lookup', @$relParent = '' &CheckRelativeCall; declare @unitCode varchar(32), @voucherNumber varchar(32), @payID varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end, @voucherNumber = dbo.ff_PadL(@so_phieu, col_length('cttt50', 'so_ct')) if exists(select 1 from cttt50 where ma_dvcs = @unitCode and ma_kh = @$ma_kh and ngay_ct <= @$ngay_lct and stt_rec = @stt_rec_phieu and so_ct = @voucherNumber) select @payID = @stt_rec_phieu else select top 1 @payID = stt_rec from cttt50 where ma_dvcs = @unitCode and ma_kh = @$ma_kh and ngay_ct <= @$ngay_lct and (da_pb <> 1 or stt_rec_pb = @$stt_rec) and so_ct = @voucherNumber order by stt_rec if @payID is not null begin select rtrim(a.tk) as tk, a.ngay_ct, a.t_tt_nt, case when isnull(a.ma_nt, '') = '' then (select val from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0') else a.ma_nt end as ma_nt, a.ty_gia, a.ma_kh, a.t_tt_nt - isnull(a.t_tien_pb_nt, 0) as tien_cl_nt from cttt50 a left join dmtk b on a.tk = b.tk where a.stt_rec = @payID return end

&CheckRelativeDeclare; select @$relController = 'RDInvoiceLookup', @$relType = 'Lookup', @$relParent = '' &CheckRelativeCall; declare @unitCode varchar(32), @voucherNumber varchar(32), @payID varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end, @voucherNumber = dbo.ff_PadL(@so_hd, col_length('cttt20', 'so_ct')) if exists(select 1 from cttt20 where ma_dvcs = @unitCode and ma_kh = @$ma_kh and ngay_ct <= @$ngay_lct and loai_tt = 0 and stt_rec = @stt_rec_hd and so_ct = @voucherNumber) select @payID = @stt_rec_hd else select top 1 @payID = stt_rec from cttt20 where ma_dvcs = @unitCode and ma_kh = @$ma_kh and ngay_ct <= @$ngay_lct and loai_tt = 0 and (tat_toan = 0 or (stt_rec in (select stt_rec_tt from cttt20 where stt_rec_pb = @$stt_rec and loai_tt = 1))) and so_ct = @voucherNumber order by stt_rec if @payID is not null begin declare @c numeric(22, 4) select @c = sum(tt_qd) from cttt20 with(nolock) where stt_rec_tt = @payID and stt_rec_pb = @$stt_rec select rtrim(a.tk) as tk, a.ngay_ct, case when isnull(a.ma_nt, '') = '' then (select val from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0') else a.ma_nt end as ma_nt, a.ty_gia, a.so_lsx, rtrim(a.ma_vv) as ma_vv, rtrim(a.ma_sp) as ma_sp, rtrim(a.ma_bp) as ma_bp, rtrim(a.ma_hd) as ma_hd, rtrim(a.ma_ku) as ma_ku, rtrim(a.ma_phi) as ma_phi, case when a.ma_nt = '' then a.t_tt else a.t_tt_nt end as tien_hd_nt, a.t_tt_qd - isnull(@c, 0) as da_tt_nt, case when a.ma_nt = '' then a.t_tt else a.t_tt_nt end - (a.t_tt_qd - isnull(@c, 0)) as cl_nt, a.ma_kh from cttt20 a left join dmtk b on a.tk = b.tk where a.stt_rec = @payID return end

if @ext_key = '' return
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @p char(6), @c char(1), @message nvarchar(4000), @getDetailType int declare @call_from varchar(64), @kieu_pb char(1), @stt_rec_phieu char(13), @ngay_pb smalldatetime, @ngay_lpb smalldatetime, @ma_nt_pb char(3), @cl_nt_phieu numeric(16, 2)
select top 0 * into #master from m43$000000 select top 0 * into #detail from d43$000000 select top 0 a.stt_rec_hd, a.ngay_hd, a.so_hd, a.ma_nt_hd, a.ty_gia_hd, a.tk_du, a.tt_nt, a.tt, a.tt_qd, b.ma_kh as ma_kh_hd, a.tt_nt as tien_hd_nt, a.tt_nt as da_tt_nt, a.tt_nt as cl_nt, identity(int, 1, 1) as line_nbr into #otherInv from #detail a, #master b
if @$stt_rec <> '' begin select @p = convert(char(6), ngay_ct, 112) from c43$000000 with(nolock) where stt_rec = @$stt_rec set @q = 'insert into #master select top 1 * from m43$' + @p + ' where stt_rec = @stt_rec' + char(13) + 'insert into #detail select * from d43$' + @p + ' with(nolock) where stt_rec = @stt_rec' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@stt_rec char(13)', @$stt_rec end
if @ext_key <> '' begin select @c = char(253) select * into #t from dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$Split(@ext_key, @c) select @stt_rec_phieu = data from #t where id = 1 select @kieu_pb = data from #t where id = 2 if @stt_rec_phieu <> '' begin select top 1 @ma_nt_pb = ma_nt, @cl_nt_phieu = (t_tt_nt - isnull(t_tien_pb_nt, 0)) from cttt50 where stt_rec = @stt_rec_phieu
select @ngay_pb = ngay_ct, @ngay_lpb = ngay_lct from #master select @ngay_pb = isnull(@ngay_pb, getdate()), @ngay_lpb = isnull(@ngay_lpb, @ngay_pb), @getDetailType = case when @action = 'Edit' then 2 else 1 end
insert into #otherInv exec rs_MultiAllocation 1, @kieu_pb, @ma_nt_pb, @ngay_pb, @ngay_lpb, '', 0, @stt_rec_phieu, '', @message out, @@language, @@userID, @@admin, @getDetailType end end
select '' as array$, stt_rec_hd, ngay_hd, so_hd, ma_nt_hd, ty_gia_hd, tk_du, tt_nt, tt, tt_qd, ma_kh_hd, tien_hd_nt, da_tt_nt, cl_nt, isnull(@cl_nt_phieu, 0) as cl_nt_phieu from #otherInv order by line_nbr return
